query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of an urban street scene. A curved road runs through the center, flanked by multi-story buildings with illuminated windows. On the left, a contemporary structure features purple and blue exterior lighting. Streetlamps cast warm light along the sidewalks, where young trees are planted. Red and white lights from vehicles follow the road's curve. A traffic signal shows green in the distance. The foreground includes a grassy patch with a traffic cone and metal barriers.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime long-exposure photograph of an urban street scene featuring intentional motion blur. Red and white light trails from vehicle taillights and headlights sweep in curved streaks along the roadway, creating dynamic ribbons of light against the dark surroundings. Multi-story buildings with illuminated windows line the street, while a modern building with purple and blue lighting stands on the left. Warm streetlamps and traffic signals punctuate the scene, and the deep shadows and high contrast emphasize the blurred, flowing quality of the traffic lights against the static architecture.
